{{Infobox character
| name = Pariana
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Presence]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|, construct containment fields, restrictive symbols}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Titan]], [[Abidan]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Second Division]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|designer of the formations}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Underlord (novel)|Underlord]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Pariana is a member of the [[Abidan]] and was formerly the final [[Abidan]] stationed in [[Sector]] Ninety-[[Eight]] of a nameless world. Physically, she is distinct from standard humans, standing three meters tall with golden skin and a bald head. Her abilities involve manipulating the [[Way]] to create protective barriers, containment fields, and complex formations using various colored runes. During her service in [[Sector]] Ninety-[[Eight]], she demonstrated the ability to use her [[Presence]]—a silver mass within her mind—to restore herself and others. Following the [[Collapse]], she developed an idolization of [[Suriel]]. After her time in [[Sector]] Ninety-[[Eight]], she was promoted to the rank of two-star [[Titan]] and joined a new squad where she utilized her skills in maintaining formations.}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|A [[Titan]] and an [[Abidan]], Pariana possesses a tall, golden body and projects a distinct [[Presence]]. Clad in white-plated armor, she serves as the designer of the formations. Throughout her existence, her specialty has never been violence.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Pariana]] is a [[Titan]] and an [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c1">''Underlord'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Pariana]]'s specialty has never been violence.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Pariana]] wears white-plated armor.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Pariana]] is the designer of the formations.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Pariana]] has a [[Presence]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Pariana]] has a tall, golden body.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c1" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Pariana]] can [[construct]] containment fields.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Pariana]]'s restrictive symbols include lines in her gold, the pure blue of the [[Way]], and alien pink Silverlord script.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Pariana]] is a member of the [[Second Division]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“Constructing containment field!” Pariana reported, spreading her hands.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
